creator: avos@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 150292
patch-wine-devel.diff

General:
- Add NLS option (set by default).
- Add desktop-file-utils dependency.
- Pass --without-{gettexpo,osmesa}.

X11 option:
- Use --with-{cms,jpeg,png}.
- Remove dependency on libXpm.

COMPHOLIO option:
- Add libtxc_dxtn to dependencies when X11 option is on.
- Explicitly disable pulseaudio.
- Fix shebang in tools/make_requests (/usr/bin/perl).
- Fix check-plist.
